description: Adding or removing liquidity in AMMs (e.g., Uniswap, Curve) without enforcing a minimum amount of LP tokens or underlying assets received can expose users to sandwich attacks or unfavorable execution. Similar to swap slippage (SCWE-090), LP operations can be front-run: an attacker manipulates the pool before the user's add/remove, then reverses after. Without `amountMin` or equivalent checks, users may receive far less than expected.
name: Add/Remove Liquidity Without Minimum Output Validation
remediation: - Accept `amountMin` (or `minLPTokens`, `minAmounts`) from users and enforce it when adding/removing liquidity. - Use deadline parameters (SCWE-141) in addition to slippage protection.
